deploy.startCommand: sh -c "pnpm --filter @watsapp/database exec prisma db push --skip-generate --accept-data-loss && (pnpm --filter @watsapp/database exec prisma db execute --schema prisma/schema.prisma --file prisma/migrations/20260625223000_ai_pgvector/migration.sql || echo 'pgvector step skipped') && pnpm --filter @watsapp/api start"
